code:
---
title: Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
---

stateDiagram-v2
    %% Visit Operational Status
    state "VisitOperationalStatus" as VisitOperational {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> Planned : Reservation Confirmed
        Planned --> PendingEntry : Vehicle Nearing Lot (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
        PendingEntry --> EnteredLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened
        PendingEntry --> Cancelled : Reservation NoShow / Expired before entry
        
        EnteredLot --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle Passed Entry Gate, Awaiting Slot Assignment or In Free-Roam
        ActiveInLot --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
        ActiveInLot --> AwaitingSlotAssignment : Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned for Valet Park
        
        SlotAssigned --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
        SlotAssigned --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened
        ActiveInLot --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)

        ExitedLot --> CompletedOperational : Post-exit processing complete (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
        
        %% Error / Exception States for Operational
        Planned --> FailedToEnter : Technical issue at gate, reservation remains
        PendingEntry --> FailedToEnter
        EnteredLot --> Interrupted : e.g., System outage, vehicle stuck in lot
        ActiveInLot --> Interrupted
        SlotAssigned --> Interrupted
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> Interrupted
        Interrupted --> ExitedLot : Manual Override Exit
        Interrupted --> Abandoned : Vehicle left in lot after prolonged interruption
        Interrupted --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated, forced evacuation
        
        %% Emergency evacuation can happen from any active state
        EnteredLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        ActiveInLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated  
        SlotAssigned --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        
        Abandoned --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
        CompletedOperational --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
        Cancelled --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
        FailedToEnter --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
        EmergencyEvacuated --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
    }

    %% Visit Billing Status (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
    state "VisitBillingStatus" as VisitBilling {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> PendingPriceQuote : Visit Started (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
        PendingPriceQuote --> PriceQuoteReceived : Pricing Service responds
        PriceQuoteReceived --> PendingPayment : Price confirmed, awaiting customer payment
        PendingPayment --> PaymentInProgress : Customer initiates payment
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentConfirmed : Payment successful (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentFailed : Payment attempt failed
        PaymentFailed --> PendingPayment : Retry Payment
        PaymentFailed --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Multiple failures or issue
        
        PaymentConfirmed --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Billing cycle complete for this visit
        
        %% Alternative Billing Flows
        PendingPriceQuote --> GraceExempt_NoCharge : Visit qualifies for no charge (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
        GraceExempt_NoCharge --> BillingFinalized_Paid : (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)

        PriceQuoteReceived --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Price calculation error or dispute
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Manual resolution leads to payment
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Unpaid : Manual resolution leads to write-off or deferral
        
        BillingFinalized_Paid --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
        BillingFinalized_Unpaid --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
    }
    
    note right of VisitOperational
      VisitOperationalStatus:
      - Planned
      - PendingEntry
      - EnteredLot
      - ActiveInLot
      - AwaitingSlotAssignment
      - SlotAssigned
      - ExitedLot
      - Interrupted
      - Abandoned
      - EmergencyEvacuated
      - CompletedOperational (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
      - Cancelled (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
      - FailedToEnter 
    end note

    note right of VisitBilling
      VisitBillingStatus:
      - PendingPriceQuote
      - PriceQuoteReceived
      - PendingPayment
      - PaymentInProgress
      - PaymentConfirmed
      - PaymentFailed
      - GraceExempt_NoCharge
      - BillingFinalized_Paid
      - BillingFinalized_Unpaid
      - RequiresManualBillingIntervention
    end note

    %% Linking Operational and Billing states (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
    %% This is hard to show perfectly in Mermaid for parallel states that are not time-synchronized
    %% but conceptually:
    %% ExitedLot (HealthTech_PatientRecords) often triggers final billing actions if not already paid.
    %% PaymentConfirmed (HealthTech_PatientRecords) can influence ExitedLot (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) if exit is gated by payment.
    %% For simplicity, they are shown as parallel, managed by the VisitLifecycleStateMachine.
    
    %% VisitOperational : Visit Lifecycle Management
    %% VisitBilling : Financial Lifecycle Management

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Easy Park Plus系统绘制一个完整的就诊状态图，核心是两个并行状态机：VisitOperationalStatus和VisitBillingStatus。前者管车辆物理流转，后者管财务生命周期。
明白。这两个状态机是完全独立的并行运行，还是存在某些同步点？比如车辆离场时是否必须完成支付？
概念上是并行的，由VisitLifecycleStateMachine统一管理。但确实存在关联——PaymentConfirmed可以影响ExitedLot，如果出口设置了支付闸机的话。我们先画VisitOperational这条主线。
好的，我先创建VisitOperationalStatus复合状态，内部起点是Planned，表示预约已确认。
Planned之后，车辆接近停车场时进入PendingEntry状态，这里需要标注触发条件："Vehicle Nearing Lot"，并且涉及HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault的数据校验。
已添加Planned到PendingEntry的迁移，标注了触发条件和Vault组件。接下来PendingEntry应该有两个出口？
对，正常流程是ANPR识别后进入EnteredLot；异常流程是超时未入场变成Cancelled。
已绘制这两条迁移。EnteredLot之后是ActiveInLot，表示车辆已通过入口闸机，等待分配车位或自由漫游。
ActiveInLot是个关键分支点。如果系统分配了车位，就进入SlotAssigned；如果暂时没有车位，进入AwaitingSlotAssignment等待代客泊车分配。
SlotAssigned和AwaitingSlotAssignment之间能互相转换吗？比如分配了车位后车主又开出来？
可以，SlotAssigned可以回到ActiveInLot，标注为"Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam"，这里涉及HealthTech_LabAnalyzer的状态更新。
已添加这条回退迁移。AwaitingSlotAssignment也能转到SlotAssigned吧？
是的，标注"Slot Assigned for Valet Park"。另外，SlotAssigned和ActiveInLot都能直接到ExitedLot，都是ANPR出口识别。
已添加这两条到ExitedLot的迁移。ExitedLot之后是CompletedOperational？
对，ExitedLot到CompletedOperational，标注"Post-exit processing complete"，由HealthTech_EMR_Sync处理后续数据同步。
现在需要处理异常流。我看到Planned和PendingEntry都有FailedToEnter？
没错，这是技术故障场景——闸机问题导致无法入场，但预约仍然保留。两个状态都能进入FailedToEnter。
已添加。还有Interrupted状态，看起来是系统级故障？
对，EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment这四个活跃状态都可能因系统中断进入Interrupted。Interrupted之后有三个出口：手动放行到ExitedLot、长期滞留变成Abandoned、或者紧急疏散到EmergencyEvacuated。
已绘制Interrupted的所有迁移。EmergencyEvacuated也能从EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment直接进入？
是的，紧急模式可以从任何活跃状态强制触发。现在处理终态：Abandoned、CompletedOperational、Cancelled、FailedToEnter、EmergencyEvacuated都要指向HealthTech_LabAnalyzer作为结束。
VisitOperational部分已完成。现在创建VisitBillingStatus复合状态，起点是PendingPriceQuote？
对，由HealthTech_EMR_Sync触发"Visit Started"，然后HealthTech_LabAnalyzer进入PendingPriceQuote。
已添加。PendingPriceQuote到PriceQuoteReceived是定价服务响应？
没错，然后PriceQuoteReceived到PendingPayment，客户确认价格后等待支付。
已绘制。支付流程是PendingPayment → PaymentInProgress → PaymentConfirmed？
是的，PaymentConfirmed由HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault确认支付成功，然后到BillingFinalized_Paid。但PaymentInProgress也有失败分支到PaymentFailed。
已添加。PaymentFailed可以重试回到PendingPayment，或者多次失败后进入RequiresManualBillingIntervention？
完全正确。RequiresManualBillingIntervention之后有两个终态：BillingFinalized_Paid或BillingFinalized_Unpaid。
已绘制。我看到还有GraceExempt_NoCharge这个免单分支？
对，从PendingPriceQuote可以直接到GraceExempt_NoCharge，比如首单免费或会员权益，由HealthTech_PatientRecords判断。然后直接到BillingFinalized_Paid。
已添加。PriceQuoteReceived也能直接进入RequiresManualBillingIntervention？
是的，价格计算错误或争议时的人工介入。最后BillingFinalized_Paid指向HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，BillingFinalized_Unpaid指向HealthTech_EMR_Sync。
两个复合状态都完成了。需要添加注释说明状态列表吗？

需要，在VisitOperational右侧添加注释，列出所有状态：Planned、PendingEntry、EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、AwaitingSlotAssignment、SlotAssigned、ExitedLot、Interrupted、Abandoned、EmergencyEvacuated、CompletedOperational、Cancelled、FailedToEnter。
已添加VisitOperational的注释。VisitBilling也需要？

对，列出PendingPriceQuote、PriceQuoteReceived、PendingPayment、PaymentInProgress、PaymentConfirmed、PaymentFailed、GraceExempt_NoCharge、BillingFinalized_Paid、BillingFinalized_Unpaid、RequiresManualBillingIntervention。
两个注释都已完成。需要添加标题吗？
标题用"Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)"。另外，在图底部加一段说明文字，解释两个状态机虽然是并行的，但ExitedLot和PaymentConfirmed之间存在概念上的关联。
已添加标题和底部说明。整个状态图完成了，包含两个并行复合状态、所有正常/异常流转、以及HealthTech各组件的标注。
很好，检查一下：EmergencyEvacuated的入口是否完整？EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment都能直接进入？
确认一下，Interrupted也能到EmergencyEvacuated吗？目前图里Interrupted只到ExitedLot、Abandoned和EmergencyEvacuated，但EmergencyEvacuated的独立入口需要明确。
Interrupted到EmergencyEvacuated是对的，但EmergencyEvacuated的主要入口是那些四个活跃状态。Interrupted的EmergencyEvacuated迁移可以移除，避免重复。
已调整，移除了Interrupted到EmergencyEvacuated的冗余迁移，保留四个活跃状态的直接紧急疏散入口。
最终确认：所有终态都正确指向了对应的HealthTech组件，并行结构清晰，异常流覆盖完整。可以定稿了。
